# Agent Workspace

This folder holds agent-specific guidance derived from the shared `.github` material for this branch.

## Current files

- `codex/AGENTS.md` - Codex-oriented instructions adapted from `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and aligned with the local `.github` docs.

## Intent

- Keep shared reference material at the `.github/` top level.
- Add tool-specific overlays here instead of rewriting imported source files repeatedly.
- Prefer additive updates for each agent family so the original imported files remain available for comparison.
